scope.summary: Record and verify the driver-side split reusable quality graph, stable aggregate, taxonomy expansion, and fail-closed local Required projection.
out_of_scope: Claiming a GitHub-hosted driver workflow run or full driver workspace compile at the verified SHA.

entry_points.name: driver reusable quality workflow
entry_points.trace: The checksum handoff binds rust-oracledb implementation commit ab8abc409843d4624a25dde6d126123dde6919ac and verified head 4f1eb3abd3af604ad29f1899251025499b0a3869; _quality.yml contains eight observable gate jobs plus a stable quality aggregate.

entry_points.name: driver local Required projection
entry_points.trace: At the verified driver head, python3 scripts/verify_required_local.py --self-test passed structural fail-closed negatives and --plan derived 28 explicit required-command records from the live workflow.

entry_points.name: driver CI taxonomy
entry_points.trace: At the verified driver head, python3 scripts/ci_taxonomy.py --check matched all 72 concrete checks in workflow YAML with no unresolved matrix names or phantom jobs.

entry_points.name: cross-repo checksum handoff
entry_points.trace: tests/artifacts/evidence/oraclemcp-eng-program-bp8ia.5.5-driver-handoff.json records exact commits, trees, paths, and SHA-256 digests; an independent local verifier recomputed every value.

limitations: No GitHub-hosted reusable-workflow execution is claimed.
The driver's mandatory build-slot service was unavailable, so no unleased full workspace compile was substituted.
This close has no required-proof/v1 artifact and remains not-ready on scoped workflow/parser evidence.
